title: Mercury | Digital Multimeter with True RMS and 8 Smart Functions, Easy to Read Voltage Tester, Electrical Tester with Digital Display, Shrouded Test Leads and batteries
features: Precise Readings | True RMS ensures accuracy, avoiding false readings in complex environments
Smart Function | Automatically detects inputs, ensuring accurate readings without manual selection
Safety First | Non-contact voltage test function ensures safe detection of AC voltage
Convenient Design | Shockproof rubber holster and shrouded probes for durability and ease of use
Reliable Performance | Conforms to EN61010 - 1:2010 standards, ensuring accuracy and safety
description: From the manufacturer Precise Readings Convenient Design Smart Function Mercury | Advanced Digital Multimeter Tester with True RMS, 8 Smart Functions, Shockproof Design & More for Accurate, Easy Measurements A smart and versatile digital multimeter, featuring true RMS and 8 intelligent functions. Supplied with a robust rubber holster, shrouded probes, and batteries, it's ready for immediate use. Simply connect the probes to your equipment, and the smart function automatically detects inputs, ensuring accurate readings without manual selection. Whether measuring current, voltage, resistance, or continuity, enjoy precise results without false readings. The large 1.25" LCD display, complete with backlight and torch function, enhances visibility in dim conditions. With a non-contact voltage test function for added safety and compliance with EN61010 - 1:2010 standards, this multimeter is indispensable for electricians, automotive enthusiasts, and household use alike. PRODUCT FEATURES: Precise Readings | True RMS ensures accuracy, avoiding false readings in complex environments Smart Function | Automatically detects inputs, ensuring accurate readings without manual selection Safety First | Non-contact voltage test function ensures safe detection of AC voltage Convenient Design | Shockproof rubber holster and shrouded probes for durability and ease of use Reliable Performance | Conforms to EN61010 - 1:2010 standards, ensuring accuracy and safety BOX CONTAINS: Smart test meter Shrouded test lead set 2x AAA batteries User guide SPECIFICATION: AC current 600mA - 10A DC current 600mA - 10A AC voltage 600mV - 600V DC voltage 600mV - 600V Capacitance 9.999nF - 9.999mF Resistance 60 Ohms - 60 MOhms Test lead length 700mm Batteries 2x AAA (supplied) Dimensions 153 x 73 x 35mm Weight 185g
